decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx. That record's source_ids include 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb3, its aliases include corridor_webster-ave-2013-02-sbs-cb3, and payload fields (limits 'from The Hub to Williamsbridge', borough Bronx, Bx41 route) match exactly. No different registry record is a better match; corridor_webster-avenue-sbs covers a different segment (Harlem River to The Hub, Manhattan+Bronx).

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Webster Avenue corridor - Based on the existing Bx41 route that carries over 20,000 daily riders - 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge
